game_name: Super Star Force: Jikūreki no Himitsu

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: Dual Mode Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game alternates between vertical-scrolling shoot 'em up flight segments and ground-based dungeon exploration with platforming/shooting elements

special_mechanics.name: Score Halving on Destruction
special_mechanics.description: When player's ship is destroyed during flight, score/time is cut in half. Acts as penalty mechanic affecting progression currency

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative empirical data only. Source material (Wikipedia) contains gameplay description and mechanical overview but no quantified physics parameters. Game combines shoot 'em up aerial segments with ground-based dungeon exploration; specific movement physics values are not documented.
